subcodes.first_line: The Book which the True One, Knower of things unseen, hath sent down unto them who have turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الحق علام الغیوب لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
